description: You are an Industrial Engineer optimizing a warehouse layout. Analyze the inventory data in ~/Desktop/inventory_velocity.csv to identify the Top 4 'Fast Mover' and Bottom 4 'Slow Mover' product categories. Using the current layout in ~/Diagrams/warehouse_current.drawio and the guidelines in ~/Desktop/slotting_rules.txt, re-slot the warehouse by moving the Top 4 'Fast Mover' racks to Zone A (the area closest to the Packing/Shipping stations on the East side) and the Bottom 4 'Slow Mover' racks to Zone C (the far rear/West side). Ensure racks do not overlap with walls or the office. Mark 'Zone A' with a label or background area and draw a 'Pick Path' arrow line showing a logical route from the Office through the aisles to the Packing Area. Export the optimized diagram as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/optimized_layout.pdf.
